name: Sarah Bryant (Male POV) - [ General Butch ]
description:
Trying my hand at another General Butch scene, this time with Sarah on the bus! People seemed to enjoy my other bots so for fellow fans of General Butch, here you go!

Again, not too much of a plot here and it's basically just going to be all smut but I am curious, maybe you can make a full story out of this? Or if you're here simply for the smut then you'll like it here too!

If you enjoyed this bot, please let me know and if you didn't enjoy it, also let me know why so I can try and tweak it

Update #1: Added a create your own scenario!
